content:

| `CHARACTER_NODE_DAVID` | v1.0 | 🔜 Planned | Dreamsmith / Tarot interpreter / Mirror-to-Mirror |

> Each of these versions includes:
> - Symbolic tags (`GEN+`, `MIR+`, `RIT+`, `LANG+`, etc.)
> - Relationship lineage chains
> - Memory echo logs
